goal: Fix Python graph-integrity failure in populate (220 GI-2 errors on Primary-Sources, 100% .py): two root causes - (1) call resolver matched calls cross-language (Python set() -> TS element named set), (2) buildNodes did not create file-grain nodes for call-resolution source files, so module-level Python calls produced resolved edges with dangling source nodes. Test-first; PS is the validation case.
plan_type_rationale: Stub category 'fix', clear acceptance (PS 220->0 errors, suite green), single-shot.

tasks.description: Failing test call-resolution-cross-language.test.ts: Python set() must not resolve to TS set; same-language project-wide call still resolves
call-resolver: languageFamily/sameLanguageFamily helpers + guard on classifyBareCall entries, classifyMethodCall unknown-receiver + imported-receiver candidates
graph-builder buildNodes: add state.callResolutions source files to seenFiles
Build; re-populate Primary-Sources; verify 220 -> 0 validation errors and clean exit
